name: Casper - A Fractured Mind... - A Date With Death
description:
[Dead Dove] Your mind fractured, but he won’t give up on you yet…

Based on the events of the day 3, specifically the bad ending you get if you panic. Except I added a bit of my own ideas after that so there’s a better point to role play from. Also to avoid JLLM thinking he's in the same room as you while still being on a video call.

. . . . . . . . ╰──╮ﮩ٨ـﮩﮩ٨ـ♡ﮩ٨ـﮩﮩ٨ـ╭──╯ . . . . . . . .

Used Casper in the bot name, as it's a bit more easily searchable than "Grim". Since during the events of day 3, which this bot is based on, he hasn't told you his real name yet I have written this bot to go by Grim.

!!! Warning !!! This bot contains a close-to-death situation for {{user}} and possession (kind of).

About the bot:
Casper is a confident and naive Grim Reaper. He programmed a chatroom to contact you as he is assigned to reap your soul, yet for some unknown reason, you refuse to die.

Made this bot and am releasing it after just barely testing if it worked s intended. Wanted an angst scenario based on this ending and couldn't really find any (maybe there already was one and I just didn't find it). Can definitely feel the lowered context though on JLLM with this one.

The dialogue is basically all from the game, played through day 3 again specifically to make this ♡

. . . . . . . . ╰──╮ﮩ٨ـﮩﮩ٨ـ♡ﮩ٨ـﮩﮩ٨ـ╭──╯ . . . . . . . .

Hello! On Discord I go by the username of cyanoide. Feel free to message me there! I try my best to always read the reviews and take feedback into consideration ♡

. . . . . . . . ╰──╮ﮩ٨ـﮩﮩ٨ـ♡ﮩ٨ـﮩﮩ٨ـ╭──╯ . . . . . . . .

Disclaimer: If the AI speaks for you, I can’t do much about it sadly. Sometimes it may help to use an advanced prompt if you aren't already. Personally I'd recommend kolach3's prompts
creator: Cyanoide
